outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Israel starts a tense ceasefire in Lebanon, as Trump sounds optimistic on Iran talks
outlets.summary: NPR reports on the 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire taking effect amid immediate violations. Trump signals talks could resume 'this weekend' in Islamabad.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Next round of US-Iran talks to take place in Pakistan on Monday, Iranian sources say
outlets.summary: CNN reports next round of talks expected Monday in Islamabad — 1 day before ceasefire expires. Also covers drone wars convergence between Ukraine and Iran, and marine ecosystem risks in Hormuz.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump declares Iran war is 'very close to being over' as peace talks resume
outlets.summary: Fox Business covers Trump's optimistic signals on peace deal. Iran agreed to 'unlimited' nuclear suspension per Bloomberg interview. Talks expected this weekend in Islamabad.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Iran Opens Strait Of Hormuz... For Now
outlets.summary: Daily Caller takes skeptical tone on Iran's Hormuz opening, emphasizing it is only for the ceasefire period and could be reversed.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Celebrations in Lebanon as ceasefire begins; Iran opens Hormuz for commercial traffic
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers celebrations in Beirut, Iran's Hormuz opening, ceasefire violations, and Macron-Starmer Hormuz summit with 30 nations.

outlets.name: Reuters/Rappler
outlets.headline: Israel, Lebanon begin ceasefire; Trump says Iran may meet US this weekend
outlets.summary: Reuters wire via Rappler covers ceasefire commencement and Trump's hints at weekend talks in Islamabad.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: After PM claims Hezbollah fight not over, Trump says Israel 'PROHIBITED' from bombing Lebanon
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers the dramatic Trump-Netanyahu rift. Netanyahu said 'job not done' on Hezbollah; Trump responded Israel is 'PROHIBITED' from bombing Lebanon.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Trump Dictates the Terms in Lebanon and Iran, Leaving Netanyahu Boxed In
outlets.summary: Haaretz analysis: Trump has 'hijacked Israeli foreign policy.' Netanyahu had no say in Lebanon truce terms. Katz confirms 10km security zone will be held indefinitely.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian: People's steadfastness forced aggressors to retreat during 40-day war
outlets.summary: Press TV frames the war as Iranian victory. Pezeshkian calls for producing narratives about 'achievements during the 40-day resistance.' Hormuz declared open for commercial traffic.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran declares Hormuz open for commercial ships as Lebanon ceasefire holds
outlets.summary: Iran International reports on Araghchi's Hormuz opening declaration. Ceasefire diplomacy advancing. Second round of US-Iran talks expected this weekend.
